mapper.select: SELECT ,fail_count,first_fail_at,locked_until FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND username = #{username}

SELECT u.*, d.name AS dept_name, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(r.role_name) FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = u.id) AS role_names FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON d.id = u.dept_id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.id = #{id}

SELECT u.*, d.name AS dept_name, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(r.role_name) FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = u.id) AS role_names FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON d.id = u.dept_id
u.deleted = 0
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND u.dept_id = #{deptId} AND u.status = #{status}
ORDER BY u.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT m.perm FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id JOIN sys_menu m ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.perm IS NOT NULL AND m.perm != ''
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT dept_id FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id FROM lab_room WHERE manager_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id FROM lab_room WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT u.*, d.name AS dept_name, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(r.role_name) FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = u.id) AS role_names FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON d.id = u.dept_id WHERE u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.id DESC
